$schema_note: Model artefact registry. Each entry is one downloadable ONNX model. fetch-model reads this file, picks the matching name+variant, downloads from `url`, verifies sha256, places under the user's cache dir. SHA-256 mismatch deletes the partial file and exits non-zero. UPDATE this manifest in the same PR that tags a release that ships the artefact — the URL in `url` should resolve as soon as the manifest is on main.

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: Default. Cost/perf sweet spot for the realesrgan-x4plus model.

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: Higher precision baseline; slower on most GPUs.

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: TensorRT 10.1 single-profile engine for sm89 — works on any sm89 GPU (RTX 4090, L4, L40, L40S, RTX 6000 Ada, RTX 4000 Ada). Built on L40S. (A dual-profile _b4 variant exists on the release but is NOT in this manifest — it had a 5-22x per-image regression, see FOLLOWUPS.md.)

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: TensorRT 10.1 single-profile engine for sm86 — works on any sm86 GPU (RTX 3090, A40, A6000, A5000, A4000, A4500). Built on A40. (A dual-profile _b4 variant exists on the release but is NOT in this manifest — see FOLLOWUPS.md.)

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: TensorRT 10.1 BATCHED-ONLY engine for sm89. Profile: min=2×64×64, opt=4×512×512, max=4×720×720. Pairs with the single-profile sm89 engine (variant=engine) at runtime — handler routes batches of 2-4 same-shape images here, single images stay on the primary engine.

models.name: realesrgan-x4plus
models.notes: TensorRT 10.1 BATCHED-ONLY engine for sm86. Profile: min=2×64×64, opt=4×512×512, max=4×720×720. Pairs with the single-profile sm86 engine.
